description: 流式会话创建与池管理

success_signals.pattern: scene: pool - new sessionId already in pool tokenId: .* sessionId: .*
scene: pool - already idle sessionId: .* tokenId: .*

failure_signals.pattern: recoverable: scene: pool - getSession nil completion tokenId: .*
recoverable: scene: pool - full tokenId: .* count: .* max: .*
recoverable: scene: pool - became full during create tokenId: .* sessionId: .*
scene: pool - creation failed tokenId: .* error: .*
recoverable: scene: pool - mark idle invalid tokenId: .* sessionId: .*
recoverable: scene: pool - remove invalid tokenId: .* sessionId: .*
scene: pool - removed empty list tokenId: .*

lifecycle_signals.pattern: scene: pool - created new list tokenId: .*
scene: pool - close discard sessionId: .* tokenId: .*
scene: pool - release tokenId: .* session count: .*
scene: pool - close idle sessionId: .* tokenId: .*
scene: pool - release no pool tokenId: .*
scene: pool - release complete tokenId: .* session count: .*
scene: pool - release complete no pool tokenId: .*
scene: pool - remove no list tokenId: .* sessionId: .*
scene: pool - removed sessionId: .* tokenId: .* size: .*
scene: pool - remove not found sessionId: .* tokenId: .*
scene: pool - prune idle count: .* tokenId: .* maxSize: .* removed: [.*] newSize: .*
scene: pool - discard eligible sessionId: .* canRelease: .*

noise_patterns: scene: pool - max size per token %lu
scene: pool - reuse idle sessionId: %@ tokenId: %@
scene: pool - no idle session, requesting creation tokenId:
scene: pool - added sessionId: %@ tokenId: %@ size: %lu
scene: pool - no list for mark idle tokenId: %@ sessionId: %
scene: pool - marked idle sessionId: %@ tokenId: %@
scene: pool - not in main pool, discard path sessionId: %@ t
scene: pool - move to discard sessionId: %@ tokenId: %@
scene: pool - discard batch check count: %@ keys: %@
